# BattleRobots — Project Roadmap

## Vision
A physics-driven robot combat game built in Unity. Players assemble modular robots,
enter battle arenas, earn currency from wins, and unlock upgraded parts. All physics
uses ArticulationBody exclusively. The economy, save system, and event bus are SO-driven.

---

## Architecture Rules (enforced every session)
- **ArticulationBody only** — never Rigidbody for robot parts
- **No heap allocations** in Update / FixedUpdate
- **SO Event Channels** for all cross-component communication
- **SO assets immutable at runtime** — write only through designated mutator methods
- **XOR SaveSystem** for all persistence (MatchRecord, Wallet snapshot)
- **BattleRobots.UI** must never reference **BattleRobots.Physics**
- **PlayerWallet**: SO for runtime state, MatchRecord for persistence
- Namespaces: `BattleRobots.Core` / `BattleRobots.Physics` / `BattleRobots.UI` / `BattleRobots.Editor`

---

| T394 | ZoneControlFirstCaptureBonusSO + ZoneControlFirstCaptureBonusController — one-time first-capture wallet bonus per match; fires onFirstCapture; idempotent; "First Capture! +N" / "First Capture Pending" HUD label | 70 | **Done** | ZoneControlFirstCaptureBonusSO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Arena/ZoneControlFirstCaptureBonus"): _bonusAmount [Min(0)] default 500; optional _onFirstCapture VoidGameEvent; runtime _hasFired bool. OnEnable→Reset(). RecordCapture(): _hasFired→return; _hasFired=true+fire event. Reset(): _hasFired=false. Properties: HasFired/BonusAmount. ZoneControlFirstCaptureBonusController MB (BattleRobots.UI, DisallowMultipleComponent): _onZoneCaptured→HandleZoneCaptured→RecordCapture+wallet?.AddFunds(BonusAmount) on first fire+Refresh; _onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh; _onFirstCapture→Refresh; Refresh: null→hide; show+statusLabel="First Capture! +N"/"First Capture Pending"; BonusSO property. 12 new EditMode tests. **12 new tests. 5976 total tests across 451 test files. T001–T394 Done.** |
| T395 | ZoneControlAllZonesDominanceSO + ZoneControlAllZonesDominanceController — tracks time holding all zones simultaneously; milestone-interval wallet bonuses; "All Zones: F1s" elapsed label + "Milestones: N" + progress bar | 70 | **Done** | ZoneControlAllZonesDominanceSO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Arena/ZoneControlAllZonesDominance"): _milestoneInterval [Min(1f)] default 20f; _bonusPerMilestone [Min(0)] default 200; optional _onMilestoneReached VoidGameEvent; runtime _isDominating/_accumulatedTime/_milestonesReached. OnEnable→Reset(). StartDominating() idempotent. StopDominating() clears flag. Tick(dt): !_isDominating→return; accumulate; while≥(_milestonesReached+1)*interval→_milestonesReached++; fire event. DominanceProgress=Clamp01((accumulatedTime%interval)/interval). Reset() clears silently. Properties: IsDominating/AccumulatedTime/MilestonesReached/MilestoneInterval/BonusPerMilestone/DominanceProgress. ZoneControlAllZonesDominanceController MB (BattleRobots.UI, DisallowMultipleComponent): _onDominanceStarted→StartDominating+Refresh; _onDominanceLost→StopDominating+Refresh; _onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh; _onMilestoneReached→wallet?.AddFunds(BonusPerMilestone)+Refresh; Update→Tick(Time.deltaTime); Refresh: null→hide; show+elapsedLabel+milestoneLabel+progressBar; DominanceSO property. 12 new EditMode tests. **12 new tests. 5988 total tests across 452 test files. T001–T395 Done.** |

| T397 | ZoneControlCaptureEfficiencySO + ZoneControlCaptureEfficiencyController — player-to-total capture ratio [0,1]; fires onHighEfficiency/onLowEfficiency/onEfficiencyNormal on threshold transitions; "Efficiency: N%" HUD + bar | 68 | **Done** | ZoneControlCaptureEfficiencySO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Arena/ZoneControlCaptureEfficiency"): _highEfficiencyThreshold [Range(0,1)] default 0.7f; _lowEfficiencyThreshold [Range(0,1)] default 0.3f; optional _onHighEfficiency/_onLowEfficiency/_onEfficiencyNormal VoidGameEvent; runtime _playerCaptures/_totalCaptures/_isHighEfficiency/_isLowEfficiency. OnEnable→Reset(). RecordPlayerCapture(): ++player+total+EvaluateEfficiency. RecordBotCapture(): ++total+EvaluateEfficiency. Efficiency=Clamp01(player/total) or 0 when no captures. EvaluateEfficiency(): fires events on transitions idempotently. Reset() clears silently. OnValidate clamps low≤high. | T449 | ZoneControlMatchControllerRatingSO + ZoneControlMatchControllerRatingController — weighted composite 0–100 rating from hold ratio, capture efficiency, and lead delta; ComputeRating(float,float,int) fires _onRatingComputed; GetGradeLabel(int) returns A/B/C/D/F; "Rating: N/100" + grade HUD | 68 | **Done** | ZoneControlMatchControllerRatingSO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Arena/ZoneControlMatchControllerRating"): _holdRatioWeight/_efficiencyWeight/_leadDeltaWeight [Min(0f)] all default 1f; _maxLeadDelta [Min(1)] default 10; optional _onRatingComputed VoidGameEvent; runtime _lastRating. OnEnable→Reset(). ComputeRating(float holdRatio,float efficiency,int leadDelta): totalWeight=sum; ≤0→0+fire+return; normHold=Clamp01(ratio); normEff=Clamp01(eff); normLead=Clamp01(Max(0,delta)/maxLeadDelta); weighted=weighted-avg×100 rounded; cache+fire+return. GetGradeLabel(int) static: ≥90→A; ≥75→B; ≥55→C; ≥35→D; else F. Reset(): _lastRating=0. Properties: HoldRatioWeight/EfficiencyWeight/LeadDeltaWeight/MaxLeadDelta/LastRating. ZoneControlMatchControllerRatingController MB (BattleRobots.UI, DisallowMultipleComponent): _holdRatioSO ZoneControlZoneHoldRatioSO+_efficiencySO ZoneControlCaptureEfficiencySO+_finisherSO ZoneControlMatchFinisherSO (Data); _onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded: null guard; reads holdRatio+efficiency+leadDelta; ComputeRating+Refresh; _onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh; _onRatingComputed→Refresh; Refresh: null→hide; show+ratingLabel="Rating: N/100"+gradeLabel=GetGradeLabel; RatingSO property. 12 new EditMode tests. **12 new tests. 6642 total tests across 506 test files. T001–T449 Done. M1–M98 complete.** | ZoneControlMatchFinisherSO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Arena/ZoneControlMatchFinisher"): _bonusPerLead [Min(0)] default 50; _maxBonus [Min(0)] default 1000; optional _onFinisherApplied VoidGameEvent; runtime _lastBonus/_totalBonusAwarded. OnEnable→Reset(). ComputeLeadBonus(int playerCaptures,int botCaptures)→int: lead=player-bot; ≤0→0; return Min(lead×_bonusPerLead,_maxBonus). ApplyFinisher(int,int): compute; _lastBonus=bonus; if&gt;0: _totalBonusAwarded+=bonus; fire _onFinisherApplied; return bonus. Reset(): clears silently. Properties: BonusPerLead/MaxBonus/LastBonus/TotalBonusAwarded. ZoneControlMatchFinisherController MB (BattleRobots.UI, DisallowMultipleComponent): private _playerCaptureCount/_botCaptureCount int; _onPlayerZoneCaptured→_playerCaptureCount++; _onBotZoneCaptured→_botCaptureCount++; _onMatchStarted→reset counts+Reset+Refresh; _onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded: null guard; bonus=ApplyFinisher(counts); wallet?.AddFunds(bonus) when&gt;0; Refresh; _onFinisherApplied→Refresh; Refresh: null→hide; show+leadLabel="Lead: N"+bonusLabel="Finisher Bonus: N"; FinisherSO property. 12 new EditMode tests. **12 new tests. 6594 total tests across 502 test files. | T401 | ZoneControlTimedBonusWindowSO + ZoneControlTimedBonusWindowController — externally-triggered timed bonus window that multiplies capture rewards; OpenWindow() idempotent; Tick() auto-closes after windowDuration; ApplyMultiplier(int) scales reward; "BONUS ACTIVE!"/"Standby" + countdown + progress bar | 68 | **Done** | ZoneControlTimedBonusWindowSO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Arena/ZoneControlTimedBonusWindow"): _windowDuration [Min(1f)] default 15f; _rewardMultiplier [Range(1,5)] default 2f; optional _onWindowOpened/_onWindowClosed VoidGameEvent; runtime _isActive/_elapsed/_totalWindowsOpened. OnEnable→Reset(). OpenWindow(): already active→return false; sets active+resets elapsed+increments totalWindowsOpened+fires _onWindowOpened; returns true. Tick(dt): !active→return; advance elapsed; ≥duration→CloseWindow. CloseWindow() private: clears active+elapsed+fires _onWindowClosed. ApplyMultiplier(int): active→RoundToInt(base*multiplier); else base. Reset(): clears all silently. Properties: IsActive/WindowDuration/RewardMultiplier/WindowProgress/RemainingTime/TotalWindowsOpened. ZoneControlTimedBonusWindowController MB (BattleRobots.UI, DisallowMultipleComponent): _baseCaptureReward [Min(0)] default 50; _onActivateBonusWindow→OpenWindow+Refresh; _onZoneCaptured→ApplyMultiplier(_baseCaptureReward)+wallet?.AddFunds+Refresh; _onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh; _onWindowOpened/_onWindowClosed→Refresh; Update→Tick(Time.deltaTime)+Refresh; Refresh: null→hide; show+statusLabel="BONUS ACTIVE!"/"Standby"+timerLabel=RemainingTime:F1s/"--"+progressBar.value=WindowProgress; BonusWindowSO property. 13 new EditMode tests. **13 new tests. 6062 total tests across 458 test files. OnEnable→Reset(). StartRamp(): _isActive=true+_elapsedTime=0+_currentDifficulty=start+fire event. Tick(float dt): !_isActive→return; advance elapsed clamped to duration; t=elapsed/duration; currentDifficulty=Lerp(start,end,t); fire event. Reset(): _isActive=false; _elapsedTime=0; _currentDifficulty=start (silent). OnValidate clamps. Properties: CurrentDifficulty/ElapsedTime/IsActive/RampDuration/StartDifficulty/EndDifficulty. Runtime: KillFeedEntry[] _entries (pre-allocated OnEnable), _head int, _count int. OnEnable allocates buffer+resets. Add(entry): write at _head; advance _head%max; increment _count up to max; raise _onFeedUpdated. Clear(): _count=0;_head=0; raise _onFeedUpdated. GetEntry(index): newest-first via (_head-1-index)%max; out-of-range→default. EnsureBuffer() defensive init. MaxEntries/Count properties. OnValidate clamps. KillFeedController MB (BattleRobots.UI, DisallowMultipleComponent): optional _feedSO KillFeedSO; optional _onFeedUpdated/_onMatchEnd VoidGameEvent; optional _entryContainer Transform. FeedSO public property. 16 new EditMode tests: KillFeedSOTests (10) + KillFeedControllerTests (6). Total: 2726 tests across 202 test files. M18 complete. |

| T134 | EnergySystemSO — runtime SO tracking current/max energy, recharge rate, events; Consume/Recharge/LoadSnapshot/Reset/TakeSnapshot API; OnEnable fills to max | 88 | **Done** | EnergySystemSO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Core/EnergySystem"): _maxEnergy [Min(1f)] default 100; _rechargeRate [Min(0f)] default 10; optional _onEnergyChanged/_onEnergyDepleted/_onEnergyFull VoidGameEvent; runtime _currentEnergy float (not serialized); OnEnable fills _currentEnergy=_maxEnergy (no events). Properties: CurrentEnergy/MaxEnergy/RechargeRate float; EnergyRatio float (safe div, 0 when max≤0). Consume(float amount): amount<0→false; currentEnergy<amount→false; subtract; raise _onEnergyChanged; if currentEnergy≤0 raise _onEnergyDepleted; return true. Recharge(float deltaTime): ≤0 or already full→return; add rechargeRate×dt; raise _onEnergyChanged; if newly full raise _onEnergyFull. LoadSnapshot(float): Clamp(value,0,max) — bootstrapper-safe, no events. TakeSnapshot()→float. Reset(): fill to max + raise _onEnergyChanged. 20 new EditMode tests: EnergySystemSOTests (FreshInstance×4; Consume-negative/sufficient/insufficient/exact/reduces/fires-changed/fires-depleted×7; Recharge-zeroDt/negDt/increases/caps/fires-full×5; LoadSnapshot-clamps-max/clamps-zero×2; TakeSnapshot×1; Reset-fills×1). Total: 2474 tests across 178 test files. M13 started. |

Scores IReadOnlyList<int> (chronological); MaxEntries int. AverageScore float — safe-division, 0f when empty. TrendDelta int — last-first when Count≥2, else 0 (positive=improving, negative=declining). Record(int score): append; evict front when count>MaxEntries; fire _onHistoryUpdated. LoadSnapshot(List<int>): null→clear; keep tail (most-recent) entries up to MaxEntries; bootstrapper-safe (no event). TakeSnapshot()→List<int>: shallow copy in chronological order. Reset(): clear (no event). | T111 | RobotBuildRatingConfig + RobotBuildRatingCalculator + BuildRatingSO + BuildRatingController — composite build power score (0–∞) for the player's current robot, shown in pre-match UI | 82 | **Done** | RobotBuildRatingConfig SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Core/BuildRatingConfig"): _baseStatWeight float [Min(0)] default 1; _upgradeWeight float [Min(0)] default 15; _synergyWeight float [Min(0)] default 25; five rarity-point int fields (Common=0, Uncommon=5, Rare=15, Epic=30, Legendary=50); GetRarityPoints(PartRarity)→int switch with default 0; OnValidate clamps all to ≥0. RobotBuildRatingCalculator static class (Core): Calculate(PlayerLoadout, ShopCatalog, PlayerPartUpgrades, PartSynergyConfig, RobotBuildRatingConfig)→int: null config/loadout/catalog→0; empty equipped IDs→0; builds catalogLookup Dictionary O(n); per equipped part: adds rarity points + (upgrades?.GetTier×upgradeWeight when upgrades non-null) + (stat score = healthBonus+(speed-1)×50+(damage-1)×50+armorRating)×baseStatWeight; synergy count × synergyWeight when synergyConfig non-null; returns Mathf.Max(0, Mathf.RoundToInt(total)). BuildRatingSO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Core/BuildRating"): CurrentRating int property; UpdateRating(loadout,catalog,upgrades,synergyConfig,ratingConfig) delegates to Calculator, stores result, fires _onRatingChanged IntGameEvent; Reset() sets to 0 no event. Correctly handles returning player with legitimately empty wallet. |

| T085 | ChallengeProgressHUDController — live in-match daily-challenge progress HUD | 70 | **Done** | ChallengeProgressHUDController MB (BattleRobots.UI): subscribes to _onMatchStarted (VoidGameEvent), _onMatchEnded (VoidGameEvent), _onTimerUpdated (FloatGameEvent); HandleMatchStarted sets _matchRunning/resets dedup state; HandleMatchEnded hides panel; HandleTimerUpdated captures round duration from first tick after match start (MatchManager fires initial _onTimerUpdated.Raise(_timeRemaining) in HandleMatchStarted, giving full round duration as first value); computes elapsed = _roundDuration − secondsRemaining; dedup on FloorToInt(elapsed) (≤1 string alloc/second, same strategy as CombatHUDController); calls Refresh(elapsed). BuildProgressText(condition, elapsed, damageDone, damageTaken): NoDamageTaken→ "No Damage: N taken" / "No Damage: FAILED (N taken)"; WonUnderDuration→ "Speed Run: Xs / Ys"; DamageDealtExceeds→ "Damage: N / T"; DamageEfficiency→ "Efficiency: N% / T%" (zero-total guard → 0%). No Physics refs; no Update/FixedUpdate; all UI fields optional; cached delegates in Awake. Tick(dt): !running or expired→return; decrement clamped to 0; raise _onTimerUpdated(remaining); when ≤0 and !expired: expired=true+isRunning=false+raise _onTimerExpired. Reset(): full duration+clear running/expired. MatchModifierSO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Match/MatchModifier"): DisplayName/Description; RewardMultiplier float ≥0.1 (default 1.0); TimeMultiplier float ≥0.1 (default 1.0); ArmorMultiplier float ≥0 (default 1.0); SpeedMultiplier float ≥0.1 (default 1.0); OnValidate clamps all multipliers to minimums + warns empty DisplayName. MatchModifierCatalogSO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Match/MatchModifierCatalog"): immutable IReadOnlyList<MatchModifierSO>; OnValidate warns null entries. SelectedModifierSO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Match/SelectedModifier"): mutable runtime SO; Select(modifier) sets Current+HasSelection+fires VoidGameEvent; Reset() clears silently; CurrentDisplayName → "Standard" fallback when unset/null. MatchModifierSelectionController MB (BattleRobots.UI): mirrors DifficultySelectionController pattern — prev/next wrap-around, optional _nameLabel+_descriptionLabel Text labels, ApplySelection on OnEnable, cached UnityAction delegates, no Update, no Physics refs. MatchManager patched: optional _selectedModifier field; HandleMatchStarted multiplies _timeRemaining by Current.TimeMultiplier after base duration resolved; caches _activeRoundDuration (post-modifier) to fix elapsed computation bug when time multiplier != 1; EndMatch applies Current.RewardMultiplier to totalReward after streak bonus (streak × modifier stacking). CombatStatsApplicator patched: optional _selectedModifier field; ApplyStats() scales base speed by Current.SpeedMultiplier and armor rating by Current.ArmorMultiplier (Mathf.Clamp [0,100]) before pushing to locomotion/DamageReceiver. All integrations fully null-safe; backwards-compatible (null _selectedModifier = multipliers all 1). MatchModifierSOTests (13 tests): 7 fresh-instance defaults; MatchModifierType_HasExactlySixValues; AllModifierTypes_CanBeAssignedAndRead; 4 reflection round-trips. MatchModifierCatalogSOTests (6 tests): not-null/empty/IReadOnlyList; count 1/2; insertion order. SelectedModifierSOTests (14 tests): 3 fresh-instance defaults; Select 8 paths (state/event/null/idempotent); Reset 3 paths (clears+silent). MatchModifierSelectionControllerTests (16 tests): initial index=0; NextModifier null/empty/increment/wrap/cycle; PreviousModifier null/empty/wrap/decrement; NextThenPrev returns start; SO write verification (next/prev); null SO no-throw. Total tests: 1292 across 97 files. |

| T134 — EnergySystemSO | 2026-04-13 | EnergySystemSO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Core/EnergySystem"): _maxEnergy [Min(1f)] default 100; _rechargeRate [Min(0f)] default 10; optional _onEnergyChanged/_onEnergyDepleted/_onEnergyFull VoidGameEvent; runtime _currentEnergy float (not serialized). OnEnable fills _currentEnergy=_maxEnergy (no events). Properties: CurrentEnergy/MaxEnergy/RechargeRate/EnergyRatio (safe div). Consume(float): <0→false; insufficient→false; subtract; raise _onEnergyChanged; if ≤0 raise _onEnergyDepleted; return true. Recharge(float dt): ≤0 or full→no-op; add rate×dt capped at max; raise _onEnergyChanged; if newly full raise _onEnergyFull. LoadSnapshot(float): Clamp(0,max) — bootstrapper-safe, no events. TakeSnapshot()→float. Reset(): fill to max + raise _onEnergyChanged. 20 new EditMode tests: EnergySystemSOTests (FreshInstance×4; Consume×7; Recharge×5; LoadSnapshot×2; TakeSnapshot×1; Reset×1). Total: 2474 tests across 178 test files. M13 started. |

MatchManager.EndMatch() patched (Core): captures `levelBefore = _playerProgression?.CurrentLevel ?? 1` before `AddXP()`; computes `xpEarned` via `XPRewardCalculator.CalculateMatchXP()`; detects `leveledUp = currentLevel > levelBefore`; reads `newLevel = currentLevel ?? 1`; passes all three to `_matchResult?.Write(...)` alongside existing params; null `_playerProgression` → xpEarned=0/leveledUp=false/newLevel=1 (backwards-compatible). PostMatchController patched (BattleRobots.UI): 10 new optional inspector fields in "M7 Progression", "M7 Tier", "M7 Achievement" headers — `_xpEarnedText Text`, `_levelText Text`, `_levelUpBanner GameObject`, `_buildRating BuildRatingSO`, `_tierConfig RobotTierConfig`, `_tierText Text`, `_playerAchievements PlayerAchievementsSO`, `_achievementCatalog AchievementCatalogSO`, `_achievementText Text`, `_achievementBanner GameObject`; `ShowResults()` extended: XP text → "XP: +N"; level text → "Level N"; level-up banner SetActive(LeveledUp); tier text → `RobotTierEvaluator.EvaluateTier + GetDisplayName` (guarded by buildRating+tierConfig non-null); achievement banner SetActive(LastUnlockedId non-empty); achievement text → catalog display name with raw-ID fallback; all blocks null-safe and guarded by `_matchResult != null` early-return. No Physics refs; no new Update/FixedUpdate. 30 new EditMode tests (PostMatchM7Tests.cs): Part 1 — MatchResultSO M7 fields (9: fresh-instance defaults×3; Write-with-params×3; Write-omitting-params backwards-compat×3; Write-twice overwrites); Part 2 — MatchManager M7 integration (7: win/loss XPEarned>0; level-up true/false; null-progression XPEarned=0/LeveledUp=false/NewLevel=1); Part 3 — PostMatchController M7 display (14: null-safety×4; XP text; level text; level-up banner on/off; tier text DoesNotThrow; achievement banner on/off; achievement with catalog uses displayName; achievement without catalog uses raw ID). | T080 — CountdownManager + MatchCountdownController | 2026-04-11 | CountdownManager MB (BattleRobots.Core): pre-match 3-2-1-FIGHT countdown; fires IntGameEvent ticks (_countdownFrom downto 1), then raises _onCountdownComplete + _matchStartedEvent. Three execution paths: (1) _countdownFrom≤0 → immediate, (2) _countdownFrom>0 + both delays==0 → synchronous same-frame (testable in EditMode), (3) any delay>0 → coroutine. Drop-in replacement for MatchStarter. MatchCountdownController MB (BattleRobots.UI): subscribes to tick+complete channels; shows/hides _countdownPanel; sets _countdownText to count or "FIGHT!"; WaitForSecondsRealtime hide coroutine. All delegates cached in Awake (zero alloc). **Next milestone (M175):** Suggested directions: (a) `ZoneControlCaptureSigmaAlgebraSO + ZoneControlCaptureSigmaAlgebraController` — sigma-algebra (measure theory); player captures accumulate measurable sets; `Measure()` awards bonus; bot captures scatter sets; (b) `ZoneControlCaptureMeasureSO + ZoneControlCaptureMeasureController` — measure space; player captures accumulate samples; `Integrate()` awards bonus; bot captures remove samples; (c) `ZoneControlCaptureOrderIdealSO + ZoneControlCaptureOrderIdealController` — order ideal (downward-closed set in poset); player captures accumulate ideals; `Extend()` awards bonus; bot captures shrink ideals; (d) `ZoneControlCaptureGaloisSO + ZoneControlCaptureGaloisController` — Galois connection; player captures accumulate closures; `Connect()` awards bonus; bot captures break connections.

- T523: `ZoneControlCaptureCrestSO` (Core SO, order 208) — `_waveRisePerCapture [Min(0.1f)]` default 1f; `_waveFallPerBotCapture [Min(0f)]` default 0.5f; `_waveHeightForCrest [Min(1f)]` default 5f; `_bonusPerCrest [Min(0)]` default 400; optional `_onCrest`; `RecordPlayerCapture()`: `wave=Min(wave+rise,max)`; if `>=max`→`Crest()`: `crestCount++; wave=0; fire`; `RecordBotCapture()`: `wave=Max(0,wave-fall)`; `WaveProgress=Clamp01(wave/max)`. `ZoneControlCaptureCrestController` (UI MB) — delta-checks `CrestCount` to credit wallet; `waveLabel="Wave: F1/F0"`+`crestLabel="Crests: N"`+waveBar. 14 tests.
- T524: `ZoneControlCaptureForgeSO` (Core SO, order 209) — `_capturesPerIngot [Min(1)]` default 3; `_ingotsForForge [Min(1)]` default 3; `_bonusPerForge [Min(0)]` default 450; optional `_onForge`; `RecordPlayerCapture()`: `++_rawCaptures`; if `>=capturesPerIngot`: `_rawCaptures=0; _ingotCount++`; if `>=ingotsForForge`→`Forge()`: `_forgeCount++; bonus; _ingotCount=0; fire`; `RecordBotCapture()`: scatters raw and ingots; `IngotProgress/RawProgress`. `ZoneControlCaptureForgeController` (UI MB) — delta-checks `ForgeCount` for wallet credit; `ingotLabel="Ingots: N/M"`+`rawLabel="Raw: N/M"`+`forgeCountLabel="Forges: N"`+ingotBar. 14 tests.
- T525: `ZoneControlCaptureBeaconSO` (Core SO, order 210) — `_capturesForBeacon [Min(1)]` default 4; `_bonusPerBeaconCapture [Min(0)]` default 90; `_durabilityMax [Min(1)]` default 3; optional `_onBeaconLit/_onBeaconExtinguished`; `RecordPlayerCapture()`: if lit: return bonus; else `++_chargeCount`; if `>=capturesForBeacon`→`Light()`: `_isLit=true; _currentDurability=max; _beaconLitCount++; fire`; `RecordBotCapture()`: if not lit→return; `--_currentDurability`; if `<=0`→`Extinguish()`: `_isLit=false; fire`; `ChargeProgress/DurabilityProgress` dual-mode. `ZoneControlCaptureBeaconController` (UI MB) — credits wallet on positive return from `RecordPlayerCapture()`; `statusLabel="BEACON LIT! (N/M)"/"Charging: N/M"`+`beaconCountLabel="Beacons: N"`+beaconBar. 14 tests.

- T496: `ZoneControlCaptureNovaSO` (Core SO, order 181) — `_novaThreshold [Min(1f)]` default 5f; `_decayRate [Min(0f)]` default 0.5f; `_bonusPerNova [Min(0)]` default 250; optional `_onNova VoidGameEvent`; runtime `_novaPool/_novaCount/_totalBonusAwarded`. `RecordCapture()`: `_novaPool++`; if `≥threshold: ++novaCount; totalBonus+=bonus; pool=0; fire _onNova`. `Tick(dt)`: `pool≤0→return; pool=Max(0,pool-decayRate×dt)`. `NovaProgress=Clamp01(pool/threshold)`. `Reset()` clears all. `ZoneControlCaptureNovaController` (UI MB) — `_onZoneCaptured→HandleCapture`: null guard; `prev=NovaCount; RecordCapture`; if `NovaCount>prev→wallet?.AddFunds(BonusPerNova)`; Refresh; `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onNova→Refresh`; `Update→Tick(Time.deltaTime)+Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+`poolLabel="Nova Pool: F1/F0"`+`novaCountLabel="Novas: N"`+`novaBar.value=NovaProgress`; `NovaSO` property; DisallowMultipleComponent. 13 tests.
- T497: `ZoneControlCaptureWarpSO` (Core SO, order 182) — `_maxWarpLevel [Min(1)]` default 5; `_warpMultiplierPerLevel [Min(0.1f)]` default 0.2f; optional `_onWarpLevelChanged VoidGameEvent`; runtime `_currentStreak/_currentWarpLevel`. `RecordPlayerCapture()`: `++streak`; `newLevel=Min(streak,max)`; if `newLevel!=current: set+fire`. `RecordBotCapture()`: `streak==0&&level==0→return`; `streak=0; level=0; fire`. `ComputeWarpBonus(int)=RoundToInt(base×WarpMultiplier)`. `WarpMultiplier=1+level×per`. `WarpProgress=Clamp01(level/max)`. `Reset()` clears all. `ZoneControlCaptureWarpController` (UI MB) — `_baseCaptureReward [Min(0)]` default 50; `_onPlayerZoneCaptured→HandlePlayerCaptured`: null guard; `RecordPlayerCapture`; `wallet?.AddFunds(ComputeWarpBonus(_base))`; Refresh; `_onBotZoneCaptured→HandleBotCaptured`: null guard+`RecordBotCapture+Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onWarpLevelChanged→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+`warpLabel="Warp: F1×"`+`streakLabel="Streak: N"`+`warpBar.value=WarpProgress`; `WarpSO` property; DisallowMultipleComponent. 13 tests.

**M109 Zone Control Capture Mechanics Layer IX — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T490–T493).**

Properties: `VolatilityThreshold/LeadChanges/IsHighVolatility`. `ZoneControlMatchVolatilityController` (UI MB) — `_onMajorityAchieved→HandleMajorityAchieved`: `RecordLeadChange(true)+Refresh`; `_onMajorityLost→HandleMajorityLost`: `RecordLeadChange(false)+Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onHighVolatility/_onVolatilityUpdated→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+changesLabel="Volatility: N changes"+statusLabel="HIGH!"/"Stable"; `VolatilitySO` property; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.

- T446: `ZoneControlCaptureHeatSO` (Core SO) — `_heatPerCapture [Min(0f)]` default 20f; `_decayRate [Min(0f)]` default 5f; `_highHeatThreshold [Range(0,100)]` default 60f; `_maxHeat [Min(0f)]` default 100f; optional `_onHeatHigh/_onHeatCooled VoidGameEvent`. `RecordCapture()`: heat=Min(heat+per,max)+EvaluateHeat. `Tick(dt)`: ≤0→return; decay clamped 0+EvaluateHeat. `EvaluateHeat()`: fires `_onHeatHigh` false→true; `_onHeatCooled` true→false. `HeatProgress=Clamp01(current/max)`. `Reset()` zeros heat+_isHot. `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlCaptureHeatController` (UI MB) — `_onZoneCaptured→HandleZoneCaptured`: null guard+`RecordCapture+Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted/_onMatchEnded→Reset+Refresh`; `_onHeatHigh/_onHeatCooled→Refresh`; `Update→Tick(Time.deltaTime)+Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+heatLabel="Heat: F1"+heatBar.value=HeatProgress; `HeatSO` property. 12 tests.
- T447: `ZoneControlFirstBloodBonusSO` (Core SO) — `_playerFirstBloodBonus [Min(0)]` default 300; `_botFirstBloodBonus [Min(0)]` default 0; optional `_onFirstBloodPlayer/_onFirstBloodBot VoidGameEvent`. `RecordPlayerCapture()`: fired→return 0; set+fire; return bonus. `RecordBotCapture()`: fired→return 0; set+fire; return 0. `Reset()` clears all. `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlFirstBloodController` (UI MB) — `_onPlayerZoneCaptured→HandlePlayerCaptured`: null guard+RecordPlayerCapture; bonus>0→wallet?.AddFunds+Refresh; `_onBotZoneCaptured→HandleBotCaptured`: RecordBotCapture+Refresh; `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; Refresh: statusLabel+playerBadge/botBadge.SetActive; `FirstBloodSO` property. 12 tests.
- T448: `ZoneControlCaptureSpreeTrackerSO` (Core SO) — `_spreeThreshold [Min(2)]` default 3; `_spreeWindowSeconds [Min(0.1f)]` default 8f; `_bonusPerSpreeCapture [Min(0)]` default 40; optional `_onSpreeStarted/_onSpreeEnded VoidGameEvent`. `RecordPlayerCapture(float)`: withinWindow=lastTime≥0&&gap≤window; streak++/1; lastTime=t; if streak≥threshold&&!active: activate+count+fire; if active→bonus. `BreakSpree()`: streak=0+lastTime=-1f; if active: deactivate+fire _onSpreeEnded. `Reset()` clears all. `ZoneControlCaptureSpreeTrackerController` (UI MB) — `_onPlayerZoneCaptured→HandlePlayerCaptured`: RecordPlayerCapture(Time.time); bonus>0→wallet?.AddFunds; `_onBotZoneCaptured→HandleBotCaptured`: BreakSpree+Refresh; `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; Refresh: spreeLabel="Spree: N"+bonusLabel="Bonus: N"; `SpreeTrackerSO` property. 12 tests.
- T449: `ZoneControlMatchControllerRatingSO` (Core SO) — `_holdRatioWeight/_efficiencyWeight/_leadDeltaWeight [Min(0f)]` all default 1f; `_maxLeadDelta [Min(1)]` default 10; optional `_onRatingComputed VoidGameEvent`. `ComputeRating(float,float,int)`: totalWeight=sum; ≤0→0+fire+return; normHold=Clamp01; normEff=Clamp01; normLead=Clamp01(Max(0,delta)/max); weighted-avg×100 rounded; cache+fire+return. `GetGradeLabel(int)` static: ≥90→A; ≥75→B; ≥55→C; ≥35→D; else F. `Reset()` zeros. `ZoneControlMatchControllerRatingController` (UI MB) — reads `_holdRatioSO.HoldRatio+_efficiencySO.Efficiency+_finisherSO`; `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded`: ComputeRating+Refresh; `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; Refresh: ratingLabel="Rating: N/100"+gradeLabel; `RatingSO` property. 12 tests.

- T419: `ZoneControlMatchTempoSO` (Core SO) — `MatchTempo enum Low/Normal/High`; `_slowThreshold [Min(0.1f)]` default 1f; `_fastThreshold [Min(0.1f)]` default 3f; `EvaluateTempo(float)`: classify next; same→return; set+fire `_onTempoChanged`; `GetTempoLabel()` switch; `Reset()→Low`; `OnValidate` clamps fast≥slow; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlMatchTempoController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onZoneCaptured→HandleZoneCaptured`: reads `_rateSO.GetAverageRate(Time.time)`+`EvaluateTempo`+Refresh; `_onTempoChanged→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+tempoLabel="Tempo: X"; `TempoSO` property; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T420: `ZoneControlCaptureAccuracySO` (Core SO) — `_totalAttempts/_totalSuccesses`; `RecordAttempt()`: ++attempts; `RecordSuccess()`: ++successes+fire `_onAccuracyChanged`; `Accuracy=Clamp01(successes/attempts)` or 0 when no attempts; `Reset()` clears silently; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlCaptureAccuracyController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onPlayerZoneAttempted→RecordAttempt+Refresh`; `_onPlayerZoneCaptured→RecordSuccess+Refresh`; `_onAccuracyChanged→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+accuracyLabel="Accuracy: N%"+accuracyBar.value=Accuracy; `AccuracySO` property; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T421: `ZoneControlMatchSummaryBonusSO` (Core SO) — `_captureWeight [Min(0f)]` default 2f; `_efficiencyWeight [Min(0f)]` default 3f; `_comboWeight [Min(0f)]` default 1f; `_bonusScale [Min(1)]` default 100; `ComputeSummaryBonus(int,float,int)`: totalWeight; ≤0→0; normalise each to [0,1]; weighted avg×bonusScale rounded; `ApplySummaryBonus(int,float,int)`: compute+cache `_lastBonus`+accumulate `_totalBonus`; fire `_onBonusApplied` when>0; return bonus; `Reset()` clears silently; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlMatchSummaryBonusController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded`: captures=`_captureQuotaSO?.CaptureCount`; efficiency=`_accuracySO?.Accuracy`; `ApplySummaryBonus`+`wallet?.AddFunds`+Refresh; `_onBonusApplied→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+bonusLabel="Summary Bonus: N"+totalLabel="Total: N"; `SummaryBonusSO` property; DisallowMultipleComponent. 13 tests.

**M90 Zone Control Quota, Lose Streak, Capture Gap &amp; Match Endurance Bonus — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T414–T417).**
- T414: `ZoneControlCaptureQuotaSO` (Core SO) — `_quotaTarget [Min(1)]` default 10; `_bonusOnCompletion [Min(0)]` default 500; `RecordCapture()` idempotent after quota met; fires `_onQuotaMet`; `QuotaProgress=Clamp01(count/target)`; `Reset()` clears silently; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlCaptureQuotaController` (UI MB) — `_onZoneCaptured→HandleZoneCaptured`: null guard+`RecordCapture`+Refresh; `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onQuotaMet→HandleQuotaMet`: `wallet?.AddFunds(BonusOnCompletion)`+Refresh; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+"Quota: N/M"+"Bonus: N"/"Bonus: Pending"; `QuotaSO` property; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T415: `ZoneControlLoseStreakTrackerSO` (Core SO) — `_warningThreshold [Min(1)]` default 3; `RecordBotCapture()` increments streak; fires `_onLoseStreakWarning` on threshold (idempotent); `RecordPlayerCapture()` resets if streak>0+fires `_onLoseStreakReset`; `Reset()` clears silently; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlLoseStreakTrackerController` (UI MB) — `_onBotZoneCaptured→HandleBotCapture`: `RecordBotCapture`+Refresh; `_onPlayerZoneCaptured→HandlePlayerCapture`: `RecordPlayerCapture`+Refresh; `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onLoseStreakWarning/_onLoseStreakReset→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+"Lost Streak: N"+statusLabel="WARNING!"/"Normal"; `TrackerSO` property; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T416: `ZoneControlCaptureGapSO` (Core SO) — `_fastGapThreshold [Min(0.1f)]` default 5f; `RecordCapture(float t)`: first call initialises timer; subsequent calls compute gap=t-lastTime; fires `_onFastCapture` when gap≤threshold; `HasFirstCapture=_lastCaptureTime≥0f`; `Reset()` clears silently; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlCaptureGapController` (UI MB) — `_onZoneCaptured→HandleZoneCaptured`: null guard+`RecordCapture(Time.time)`+Refresh; `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onFastCapture→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+gapLabel="Gap: F1s"/"Gap: --"+statusLabel="FAST!"/"Normal"; `GapSO` property; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T417: `ZoneControlMatchEnduranceBonusSO` (Core SO) — `_tier1/2/3Target [Min(1)]` defaults 5/10/20; `_tier1/2/3Bonus [Min(0)]` defaults 100/250/500; `RecordCapture()` increments; `ComputeTier()` returns 0–3; `ApplyEndBonus()` awards cumulative new-tier bonuses+fires `_onBonusApplied`; `OnValidate` clamps tiers ascending; `Reset()` clears silently; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlMatchEnduranceBonusController` (UI MB) — `_onZoneCaptured→RecordCapture+Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded`: `ApplyEndBonus()`+`wallet?.AddFunds(bonus)`+Refresh; `_onBonusApplied→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+"Caps: N"+"Tier: N"; `EnduranceSO` property; DisallowMultipleComponent. 13 tests.

**M89 Zone Control Bonus Mechanics &amp; Match Longevity — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T410–T413).**
- T410: `ZoneControlZoneFlipBonusSO` (Core SO) — `_bonusPerFlip [Min(0)]` default 100; `RecordBotCapture()` sets `_botCapturedLast=true`; `RecordPlayerCapture()`: if `_botCapturedLast`: `_flipCount++`+`_totalBonusAwarded+=bonus`+fires `_onFlipBonus`; `_botCapturedLast=false` unconditional; `Reset()` clears silently; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlZoneFlipBonusController` (UI MB) — `_onBotZoneCaptured→HandleBotZoneCaptured`: null guard+`RecordBotCapture`+Refresh; `_onPlayerZoneCaptured→HandlePlayerZoneCaptured`: null guard; prev=FlipCount; `RecordPlayerCapture`; if FlipCount>prev→`wallet?.AddFunds(BonusPerFlip)`; Refresh; `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onFlipBonus→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+"Flips: N"+"Flip Bonus: N"; `FlipBonusSO` property; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T411: `ZoneControlMatchLongevityBonusSO` (Core SO) — `_intervalSeconds [Min(10f)]` default 30f; `_bonusPerInterval [Min(0)]` default 75; `StartTracking()` idempotent; `StopTracking()` clears flag; `Tick(dt)` accumulates when running; while elapsed≥`_nextMilestone`: `_intervalsCompleted++`+`_totalBonusAwarded+=bonus`+`_nextMilestone+=_intervalSeconds`+fire `_onLongevityBonus`; `Reset()` clears all; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlMatchLongevityBonusController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchStarted→Reset+StartTracking+Refresh`; `_onMatchEnded→StopTracking+Refresh`; `_onLongevityBonus→HandleLongevityBonus`: `wallet?.AddFunds(BonusPerInterval)`+Refresh; `Update→Tick(Time.deltaTime)`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+"Match Time: F1s"+"Longevity Bonus: N"; `LongevityBonusSO` property; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T412: `ZoneControlScoreMomentumSO` (Core SO) — `_bonusInterval [Min(1f)]` default 10f; `_bonusPerInterval [Min(0)]` default 50; `SetLeading(bool)`: fires `_onMomentumGained` on false→true; `_onMomentumLost` on true→false; idempotent; `Tick(dt)`: !leading→return; accumulate; while elapsed≥`_nextMilestone`: bonus+fire `_onMomentumBonus`; `Reset()` clears all; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlScoreMomentumController` (UI MB) — `_onMajorityAchieved→SetLeading(true)+Refresh`; `_onMajorityLost→SetLeading(false)+Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onMomentumGained/_onMomentumLost→Refresh`; `_onMomentumBonus→HandleMomentumBonus`: `wallet?.AddFunds(BonusPerInterval)`+Refresh; `Update→Tick(Time.deltaTime)`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+"Leading: F1s"+"Momentum Bonus: N"; `MomentumSO` property; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T413: `ZoneControlCaptureBurstTargetSO` (Core SO) — `_burstTargetCount [Min(2)]` default 5; `_burstWindow [Min(1f)]` default 20f; `_burstReward [Min(0)]` default 300; `RecordCapture(float t)`: Prune+Add; if Count≥target: `_burstsMet++`+`_totalBonusAwarded+=_burstReward`+fire `_onBurstTargetMet`+clear list; `Tick(float t)`: Prune only; `Reset()` clears all; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlCaptureBurstTargetController` (UI MB) — `_onZoneCaptured→HandleZoneCaptured`: null guard+`RecordCapture(Time.time)`+Refresh; `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onBurstTargetMet→HandleBurstTargetMet`: `wallet?.AddFunds(BurstReward)`+Refresh; `Update→Tick(Time.time)`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+"Burst: N/M"+"Bursts: N"; `BurstTargetSO` property; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.

**M87 Zone Control Heatshield, Capture Milestone, Zone Ownership Bonus &amp; Capture Cooldown — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T402–T405).**
- T402: `ZoneControlZoneHeatshieldSO` (Core SO) — `_maxShield [Min(0f)]` default 100f; `_decayRate [Min(0f)]` default 5f; `Activate()` idempotent: sets `_isActive=true`+`_currentShield=_maxShield`+fires `_onShieldActivated`; `Tick(dt)` decays shield; `Deplete()` private clears active+fires `_onShieldDepleted`; `ShieldProgress=Clamp01(current/max)` when active else 0; `Reset()` clears silently; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlZoneHeatshieldController` (UI MB) — `_onZoneCaptured→Activate()+Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted→Reset()+Refresh`; `_onShieldActivated/_onShieldDepleted→Refresh`; `Update→Tick(Time.deltaTime)+Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+shieldLabel="Shield: N%"+shieldBar.value=ShieldProgress; `HeatshieldSO` property; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T403: `ZoneControlCaptureMilestoneSO` (Core SO) — `_milestones int[]` default `{5,10,20,35,50}`; `_bonusPerMilestone [Min(0)]` default 100; `RecordCapture()` increments `_captureCount` then loops while `milestonesReached < Length && count >= milestones[milestonesReached]`: advances index+accumulates bonus+fires `_onMilestoneReached` (multi-milestone safe); `NextMilestoneTarget` returns `milestones[milestonesReached]` or -1 when all done; `Reset()` clears all silently; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlCaptureMilestoneController` (UI MB) — `_onZoneCaptured→HandleZoneCaptured`: records prev MilestonesReached; calls `RecordCapture()`; `crossed = new-prev`; `wallet?.AddFunds(crossed*BonusPerMilestone)`+Refresh; `_onMatchStarted→Reset()+Refresh`; `_onMilestoneReached→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+milestoneLabel="Milestone: N/M"+bonusLabel="Bonus: +N"; `MilestoneSO` property; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T404: `ZoneControlZoneOwnershipBonusSO` (Core SO) — `_bonusInterval [Min(0.5f)]` default 5f; `_bonusPerZonePerInterval [Min(0)]` default 20; `StartTracking()` idempotent; `StopTracking()` clears flag; `Tick(dt)` accumulates elapsed when running; while `elapsed>=interval`: subtract+`_totalIntervalsCompleted++`; fire `_onOwnershipBonusAwarded` (multi-interval safe); `ComputeBonus(zonesOwned)=zonesOwned*_bonusPerZonePerInterval`; `Reset()` clears all silently; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlZoneOwnershipBonusController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchStarted→Reset()+StartTracking()+Refresh`; `_onMatchEnded→StopTracking()+Refresh`; `_onOwnershipBonusAwarded→HandleBonusAwarded`: reads `_catalogSO?.PlayerOwnedCount??0`; `bonus=ComputeBonus(zonesOwned)`; `_totalBonusEarned+=bonus`; `wallet?.AddFunds(bonus)+Refresh`; `Update→Tick(Time.deltaTime)`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+ownedLabel="Owned: N"+totalLabel="Total Bonus: N"; `BonusSO` property; DisallowMultipleComponent. 13 tests.
- T405: `ZoneControlCaptureCooldownSO` (Core SO) — `_cooldownDuration [Min(0.1f)]` default 5f; `StartCooldown()` returns false when already active; else sets `_isOnCooldown=true`+`_remaining=_cooldownDuration`+`_totalCooldowns++`+fires `_onCooldownStarted`; `Tick(dt)` decrements remaining; `Expire()` private clears active+fires `_onCooldownExpired`; `CooldownProgress=Clamp01(1-remaining/duration)` when active else 0; `Reset()` clears all silently; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlCaptureCooldownController` (UI MB) — `_onZoneCaptured→StartCooldown()+Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted→Reset()+Refresh`; `_onCooldownStarted/_onCooldownExpired→Refresh`; `Update→Tick(Time.deltaTime)+Refresh` when `IsOnCooldown`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+statusLabel="Cooldown: F1s"/"Ready"+cooldownBar.value=CooldownProgress; `CooldownSO` property; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.

- T401: `ZoneControlTimedBonusWindowSO` (Core SO) — `_windowDuration [Min(1f)]` default 15f; `_rewardMultiplier [Range(1,5)]` default 2f; `OpenWindow()` idempotent (returns false if active); sets active+resets elapsed+increments `_totalWindowsOpened`+fires `_onWindowOpened`; `Tick(dt)` advances elapsed and calls `CloseWindow()` when ≥duration; `CloseWindow()` private clears active+fires `_onWindowClosed`; `ApplyMultiplier(int)` returns `RoundToInt(base*multiplier)` when active else base; `Reset()` clears all silently; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlTimedBonusWindowController` (UI MB) — `_baseCaptureReward [Min(0)]` default 50; `_onActivateBonusWindow→OpenWindow+Refresh`; `_onZoneCaptured→ApplyMultiplier(_baseCaptureReward)+wallet?.AddFunds+Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onWindowOpened/_onWindowClosed→Refresh`; `Update→Tick(Time.deltaTime)+Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+statusLabel="BONUS ACTIVE!"/"Standby"+timerLabel=RemainingTime:F1s/"--"+progressBar.value=WindowProgress; `BonusWindowSO` property; DisallowMultipleComponent. 13 tests.

- T386: `ZoneControlZoneSwitchTrackerSO` (Core SO) — `_frequentSwitchThreshold [Min(1)]` default 5; `RecordCapture(int zoneIndex)` first call initialises last-zone without counting as switch; subsequent calls increment `_switchCount` when zone differs; fires `_onSwitchRecorded` on each switch and `_onFrequentSwitcher` (idempotent) on threshold crossing; `Reset()` silent; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlZoneSwitchTrackerController` (UI MB) — `_onPlayerZoneCaptured IntGameEvent→HandlePlayerZoneCaptured(int)→RecordCapture+Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onSwitchRecorded/_onFrequentSwitcher→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+switchesLabel="Switches: N"+statusLabel="FREQUENT SWITCHER"\/"Building..."; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T387: `ZoneControlCaptureComboMultiplierSO` (Core SO) — `_baseMultiplier [Min(1f)]` default 1f; `_incrementPerCapture [Min(0.1f)]` default 0.5f; `_maxMultiplier [Min(1f)]` default 4f; `_comboWindow [Min(0.5f)]` default 5f; `RecordCapture(float currentTime)` resets if window lapsed then increments clamped to max+fires `_onComboMultiplierChanged`; `Tick(float dt)` advances timer+fires reset on expiry; `ComputeBonus(int)=RoundToInt(amount*current)`; `Reset()` restores base silently; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlCaptureComboMultiplierController` (UI MB) — `_onZoneCaptured→RecordCapture(Time.time)+wallet bonus via ComputeBonus(_baseBonusPerCapture)+Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onComboMultiplierChanged→Refresh`; `Update→Tick(Time.deltaTime)`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+multiplierLabel="Combo: xF1"+comboBar.value=Clamp01(current/max); DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T388: `ZoneControlZoneOwnershipRatingSO` (Core SO) — `_totalZones [Min(1)]` default 4; `RecordControlTick(int playerZones, int totalZones)` increments `_totalTicks`; increments `_controlTicks` when `playerZones*2>totalZones`; `OwnershipRating=Clamp01(controlTicks/totalTicks)` (0 when no ticks); fires `_onRatingUpdated`; `Reset()` clears silently; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlZoneOwnershipRatingController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→_matchRunning=true+Reset+Refresh`; `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded→_matchRunning=false+Refresh`; `_onRatingUpdated→Refresh`; `Update→RecordControlTick` every `_tickInterval` seconds when `_matchRunning`; reads `ZoneDominanceSO.PlayerZoneCount`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+ratingLabel="Control: N%"+ratingBar.value=OwnershipRating; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T389: `ZoneControlMatchIntensitySO` (Core SO) — `_boolWeight [Min(0f)]` default 2.5f; `_velocityWeight [Min(0f)]` default 2.5f; `ComputeIntensity(bool isSurging, bool isFrenzy, bool isEnduring, float normalisedVelocity)` sums weight contributions (bool→+boolWeight each; velocity→+velocityWeight*Clamp01(vel)); clamps to [0,10]; caches `_lastIntensity`; fires `_onIntensityChanged`; `Reset()` clears `_lastIntensity` silently; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlMatchIntensityController` (UI MB) — reads `ZoneControlSurgeDetectorSO.IsSurging`+`ZoneControlCaptureFrenzySO.IsFrenzy`+`ZoneControlCaptureEnduranceSO.IsEnduring`+`ZoneControlCaptureVelocitySO.GetVelocity(Time.time)/_velocityDivisor`; `_onZoneCaptured→EvaluateAndRefresh`; `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onIntensityChanged→Refresh`; `Update→EvaluateAndRefresh` every `_updateInterval` seconds; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+intensityLabel="Intensity: F1/10"+intensityBar.value=LastIntensity/10f; DisallowMultipleComponent. 13 tests.

- T384: `ZoneControlEndgameBonusSO` (Core SO) — `_bonusPerZone [Min(0)]` default 100; `_minimumZonesRequired [Min(1)]` default 2; `ComputeBonus(int)=zonesOwned*bonusPerZone when≥minimum else 0`; `ApplyBonus(int)` caches `_lastBonusAmount`+accumulates `_totalBonusAwarded`+fires `_onBonusApplied` when bonus>0; `Reset()` silent; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlEndgameBonusController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded→ApplyBonus(_catalogSO?.PlayerOwnedCount??0)+wallet?.AddFunds+Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onBonusApplied→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+_bonusLabel="Last Bonus: N"+_totalLabel="Total: N"; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.

**M75 Zone Control Prestige Track, Scout Report, Rivalry &amp; Economy Boost — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T354–T357).**
- T354: `ZoneControlPrestigeTrackSO` (Core SO) — `_tierThresholds int[]` default {100,500,1000,5000}; `_tierTitles string[]` default {"Novice","Expert","Master","Legend"}; `AddCaptures(int)` ignores ≤0, accumulates, calls `EvaluateTiers()` — loop advances `_currentTierIndex` while total ≥ threshold and fires `_onPrestigeGranted` per tier; `GetPrestigeTitle()` returns title at current tier index (clamped); `Reset()` silent; `OnEnable→Reset`; `TotalCaptures/CurrentTierIndex` properties. `ZoneControlPrestigeTrackController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded→AddCaptures(summarySO.TotalZonesCaptured)+Refresh`; `_onPrestigeGranted→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide panel; show+`_titleLabel=GetPrestigeTitle()`+`_captureLabel="Captures: N"`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T355: `ZoneControlBotPattern enum` (Core): `Random=0/Systematic=1`. `ZoneControlScoutReportSO` (Core SO) — `_systematicThreshold [Min(0.1f)]` default 1.0f; `UpdateReport(int,float)` no-op when duration≤0; computes rate=captures/(duration/60); pattern=rate≥threshold→Systematic; `_isGenerated=true`; fires `_onReportGenerated`; `GetSummary()` "No data" or "Bot Rate: F1/min - Pattern"; `Reset()` silent; `OnEnable→Reset`; `BotCaptureRate/BotPattern/IsGenerated/SystematicThreshold` properties. `ZoneControlScoutReportController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→_botCaptureCount=0+_matchStartTime=Time.time+Reset+Refresh`; `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded→UpdateReport(_botCaptureCount,elapsed)+Refresh`; `_onReportGenerated→Refresh`; `RecordBotCapture()` increments `_botCaptureCount`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+label=GetSummary(); DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T356: `ZoneControlRivalrySO` (Core SO) — `_playerWins/_botWins` runtime int; `RecordResult(bool playerWon)` increments appropriate counter+fires `_onRivalryUpdated`; `RivalryDescription()` "You lead N-M"/"Tied"/"Bot leads N-M"; `WinsDelta=playerWins-botWins`; `Reset()` silent; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlRivalryController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded→RecordResult(scoreboardSO.PlayerScore>GetBotScore(0))+Refresh`; `_onRivalryUpdated→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide panel; show+label=RivalryDescription(); rivalryBar.value=playerWins/total (0.5 when no matches); DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T357: `ZoneControlEconomyBoostSO` (Core SO) — `_boostMultiplier [Min(1f)]` default 2f; `_boostDuration [Min(1f)]` default 300f; `ActivateBoost()` sets remaining=duration+_isActive=true+fires `_onBoostActivated`; `Tick(dt)` no-ops when inactive, decrements, fires `_onBoostExpired` on expiry; `ApplyBoost(int)` returns RoundToInt(amount*multiplier) when active else passthrough; `BoostProgress=remaining/duration` [0,1] when active else 0; `Reset()` silent; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlEconomyBoostController` (UI MB) — `_onBoostActivated/_onBoostExpired→Refresh`; `Update→Tick+Refresh` when active; `Refresh()`: null→hide panel; show+label="Nx Economy Active: M:SS"/label="No Boost"+progressBar.value=BoostProgress; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.

**M74 Zone Control Power-Up Catalog, Match Feed, Career Goal &amp; Seasonal Bonus — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T350–T353).**
- T350: `ZoneControlPowerUpCatalogSO` (Core SO) — `_powerUps ZoneControlPowerUpSO[]`; `SelectRandom()` picks random entry, stores `_lastSelectedIndex`, fires `_onSpawnRequested`, returns selected SO (null when empty); `GetPowerUp(int)` null-safe bounds-checked; `Reset()` sets `_lastSelectedIndex=-1` silently; `OnEnable→Reset`; `EntryCount/LastSelectedIndex` properties. `ZoneControlPowerUpCatalogController` (Core MB) — `_onSpawnPowerUp→HandleSpawnPowerUp→_catalogSO?.SelectRandom()`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→_catalogSO?.Reset()`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T351: `ZoneControlFeedEventType enum` (Core): `ZoneCaptured=0/PowerUpCollected=1/BotCapture=2/VictoryAchieved=3`. `ZoneControlMatchFeedEntry [Serializable] sealed class`: `Timestamp/Type/Message`. `ZoneControlMatchFeedSO` (Core SO) — `_maxEntries [Min(1)]` default 10; `AddEntry(float,type,string)` evicts oldest when full, null message→Empty, fires `_onFeedUpdated`; `Reset()` clears silently; `OnEnable→Reset`; `EntryCount/MaxEntries/Entries (IReadOnlyList)` properties. `ZoneControlMatchFeedController` (UI MB) — subscribes 4 event channels (zone captured/power-up collected/bot capture/victory achieved) → `AddEntry` with `Time.time`+type+label; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onFeedUpdated→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null SO→hide panel; destroy stale rows; empty→emptyLabel; spawn rows newest-first (`"{F1}s"` + message); DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T352: `ZoneControlCareerGoalType enum` (Core): `TotalCaptures=0/TotalWins=1/TotalMatches=2`. `ZoneControlCareerGoalSO` (Core SO) — `_goalType/_targetValue [Min(1)]` default 50; `AddProgress(int)` clamps≥0, accumulates, fires `_onGoalAchieved` on first crossing (idempotent); `LoadSnapshot(int,bool)` bootstrapper-safe; `TakeSnapshot()→(int,bool)`; `Reset()` silent; `OnEnable→Reset`; `GoalType/TargetValue/AccumulatedValue/IsAchieved/Progress (Clamp01)` properties. `ZoneControlCareerGoalController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded`: reads metric per GoalType (TotalCaptures→summarySO?.TotalZonesCaptured; TotalWins→1 if profileSO has wins; TotalMatches→1)+`AddProgress`+Refresh; `_onGoalAchieved→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null SO→hide; show+progressBar.value+label ("N% Complete"/"Goal Achieved!")+completeBadge.SetActive; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T353: `ZoneControlSeasonalBonusSO` (Core SO) — `_bronzeBonus/_silverBonus/_goldBonus/_platinumBonus [Min(0)]` defaults 100/250/500/1000; `GetBonusForDivision(ZoneControlLeagueDivision)` switch; `AwardBonus(division)` calculates+stores `_lastBonusAmount`+accumulates `_totalBonusAwarded`+fires `_onBonusAwarded`; `Reset()` silent; `OnEnable→Reset`; `BronzeBonus/SilverBonus/GoldBonus/PlatinumBonus/TotalBonusAwarded/LastBonusAmount` properties. `ZoneControlSeasonalBonusController` (UI MB) — `_onSeasonEnded→HandleSeasonEnded`: null guard; reads `leagueSO?.CurrentDivision??Bronze`; `AwardBonus`; `wallet?.AddFunds(LastBonusAmount)`; Refresh; `_onBonusAwarded→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+`_bonusLabel="Last Bonus: N"`+`_totalLabel="Total Earned: N"`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.

**M73 Zone Control Match Recap, Profile, Power-Ups &amp; Victory Celebration — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T346–T349).**
- T346: `ZoneControlMatchRecapSO` (Core SO) — runtime `_captureCount/_mvpIsPlayer/_victoryType/_finalPlayerScore/_finalBotScore/_isBuilt`; `BuildRecap(victorySO,mvpSO,scoreboardSO)` null-safe; `GetRecapSummary()` empty when `!IsBuilt`, else "Captures: N | MVP: P/B | Win: X | Score: N–N"; fires `_onRecapBuilt`; `Reset()` clears silently; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlMatchRecapController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded→BuildRecap+Refresh`; `_onRecapBuilt→Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null/`!IsBuilt`→hide panel; else show+label=`GetRecapSummary()`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.

- T349: `ZoneControlVictoryCelebrationConfig` (Core SO) — `_firstToCapturesBanner`/`_mostZonesHeldBanner` string; `_celebrationDuration [Min(0.1f)]` default 3f; `GetBannerText(ZoneControlVictoryType)` switch; `Duration` property. `ZoneControlVictoryCelebrationController` (UI MB) — `_onVictoryAchieved→HandleVictoryAchieved→reads VictoryType+StartCelebration`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→StopCelebration`; `Update→Tick`; `StartCelebration` arms `_timer/_isRunning`/panel/label (null config→no-op); on expiry `StopCelebration+fire _onCelebrationComplete`; `IsRunning/Timer/Config` properties; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.

- T345: `ZoneControlTieBreakSO` (Core SO) — `ZoneControlTieBreakType` enum `SuddenDeath/CaptureTarget/TimeAdvantage`; `_captureTargetBonus [Min(1)]` default 3; `EvaluateTie(int,int)`: equal+!active→`_isActive=true`+fire `_onTieBreakTriggered`; unequal+active→`_isActive=false`; same state→no-op; `TieBreakDescription` switch; `Reset()` clears silently. `ZoneControlTieBreakController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded→EvaluateTie+Refresh`; `_onTieBreakTriggered→Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null/!IsActive→hide; else show+`label=TieBreakDescription`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.

**M67 Zone Control Adaptive Spawn, Heatmap History, Zone Lock HUD &amp; Alert System — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T322–T325).**
- T322: `ZoneControlAdaptiveSpawnSO` (Core SO) — `_baseSpawnInterval [Min(0.1f)]` default 5f; `_pressureSpawnInterval [Min(0.1f)]` default 2f; `SetHighPressure(bool)` no-op when same, else set flag + fire `_onSpawnRateChanged`; `CurrentSpawnInterval` returns pressure or base interval; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlAdaptiveSpawnController` (Core MB) — `_onHighPressure→HandleHighPressure→SetHighPressure(true)`; `_onPressureRelieved→HandlePressureRelieved→SetHighPressure(false)`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset`; no Update; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T323: `ZoneControlHeatmapHistorySO` (Core SO) — `_maxSnapshots [Min(1)]` default 5; `AddSnapshot(int[])` deep-copies + evicts oldest when full + fires `_onHistoryUpdated`; `GetLifetimeHeatLevel(int)` normalised 0–1 vs hottest zone across all snapshots; `GetLifetimeTotals()` per-zone sums; `Reset()` clears silently. `ZoneControlHeatmapHistoryController` (UI MB) — `HandleMatchEnded` reads `ZoneControlHeatmapSO` per-zone counts → `AddSnapshot` + Refresh; `_onHistoryUpdated→Refresh`; `_sessionBars[i].fillAmount=GetHeatLevel(i)`; `_lifetimeBars[i].fillAmount=GetLifetimeHeatLevel(i)`; panel hidden when historySO null. 12 tests.

- T325: `ZoneControlAlertSystemSO` (Core SO) — `EvaluateAlert(bool isHighPressure, ThreatLevel threat, bool hasDominance)`: critical = pressure && threat≥High && !dominance; fires `_onCriticalAlert` on false→true; fires `_onAlertCleared` on true→false; no-op when same; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlAlertSystemController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onHighPressure/_onPressureRelieved/_onThreatChanged/_onDominanceChanged` → `EvaluateFromCurrentState` (reads all SOs, calls EvaluateAlert, re-raises out channels on transition, Refresh); `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; IsCritical→show panel + label="CRITICAL ALERT!". 12 tests.

**M68 Zone Control Capture Bonus, Round Result, Flank Detector &amp; Match Report — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T326–T329).**
- T326: `ZoneControlCaptureBonusSO` (Core SO) — `_captureThreshold [Min(1)]` default 3; `_bonusPerCapture [Min(0)]` default 50; `EvaluateBonus(int)` returns `(count-threshold)*bonus` when above threshold, accumulates `TotalBonusAwarded`, fires `_onBonusAwarded`; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlCaptureBonusController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded→EvaluateBonus(summarySO.TotalZonesCaptured)`; awards bonus to wallet; `_bonusLabel="Total Bonus: N"`; panel hidden when bonusSO null. 12 tests.
- T327: `ZoneControlRoundResultEntry [Serializable]` sealed class (Core) — PlayerWon/ScoreDelta. `ZoneControlRoundResultSO` (Core SO) — `_capacity [Min(1)]` default 5; ring buffer `_results`; `RecordResult(bool,int)` appends+prunes+fires `_onResultRecorded`; `WinRate` safe-division; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlRoundResultController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded→RecordResult(playerWon,scoreDelta)`; reads `scoreboardSO.PlayerScore>GetBotScore(0)`; `_winsLabel="Wins: N"`; `_winRateLabel="Win Rate: N%"`; panel hidden when resultSO null. 12 tests.
- T328: `ZoneControlFlankDetectorSO` (Core SO) — `_flankWindow [Min(0.1f)]` default 3f; `_flankZoneCount [Min(2)]` default 2; `Dictionary<int,float> _recentCaptures`; `RecordBotCapture(int,float)` prunes stale entries then updates zone timestamp; fires `_onFlankDetected` when distinct active zones ≥ flankZoneCount; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlFlankDetectorController` (Core MB) — subscribes `_onBotZoneCaptured IntGameEvent→HandleBotZoneCaptured(int)→RecordBotCapture(index,Time.time)`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T329: `ZoneControlMatchReportSO` (Core SO) — runtime fields: TotalZonesCaptured/MatchPressure/FinalThreatLevel/BestCombo/IsGenerated; `GenerateReport(summarySO,pressureSO,threatSO,comboSO)` null summarySO→no-op; populates from SOs; `_isGenerated=true`; fires `_onReportGenerated`; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlMatchReportController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded→GenerateReport`; `Refresh()`: null SO or !IsGenerated→hide panel; else show; labels "Zones: N"/"Threat: X"/"Best Combo: N". 12 tests.

**M69 Zone Control Capture Streak Reward, Zone Presence, Match Pace Advisor &amp; Session Export — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T330–T333).**
- T330: `ZoneControlCaptureStreakRewardSO` (Core SO) — `_streakMilestones int[]` default {3,5,10,20}; `_rewardPerMilestone [Min(0)]` default 100; `EvaluateStreak(int)` iterates pending milestones while streak≥milestone[i], increments `_unlockedMilestoneCount` + accumulates `_totalRewardAwarded` + fires `_onMilestoneReached` per tier; `NextMilestone` returns -1 when all crossed; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlCaptureStreakRewardController` (UI MB) — `_onStreakUpdated→HandleStreakUpdated`: reads `streakSO.CurrentStreak`, calls `EvaluateStreak`, credits `earned` difference to wallet, Refresh; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onMilestoneReached→Refresh`; `_streakLabel="Streak: N"`; `_nextMilestoneLabel="Next: N"/"Max!"`; panel hidden when rewardSO null. 12 tests.
- T331: `ZoneControlZoneControllerCatalogSO` (Core SO) — `_zoneCount [Min(1)]` default 4; `bool[] _playerOwned` runtime array; `SetZoneController(int zoneIndex, bool playerOwned)` OOB-safe + fires `_onControlChanged`; `GetZoneController(int)` returns false for OOB; `PlayerOwnedCount` iterates array; `Reset()` re-allocates/clears silently. `ZoneControlZonePresenceController` (Core MB) — `_onPlayerZoneCaptured IntGameEvent→HandlePlayerZoneCaptured→SetZoneController(index, true)`; `_onBotZoneCaptured IntGameEvent→HandleBotZoneCaptured→SetZoneController(index, false)`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T332: `ZoneControlPaceAdvice` enum (OnTarget/AheadOfPace/BehindPace). `ZoneControlMatchPaceSO` (Core SO) — `_targetPace [Min(0.1f)]` default 1.5; `_aheadThreshold/_behindThreshold [Min(0.1f)]` default 0.5; `EvaluatePace(float)`: rate≥target+ahead→AheadOfPace+fires `_onAheadOfPace`; rate≤target-behind→BehindPace+fires `_onBehindPace`; else OnTarget; caches `LastAdvice`; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlMatchPaceAdvisorController` (UI MB) — `_onPaceUpdated→HandlePaceUpdated→GetCapturesPerMinute(Time.time)+EvaluatePace+Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null paceSO||trackerSO→hide; `_adviceLabel="Ease off"/"Speed up"/"On target"` per LastAdvice; panel hidden when either SO null. 12 tests.
- T333: `ZoneControlSessionPayload [Serializable]` sealed class (TotalZonesCaptured/MatchesPlayed/BestCaptureStreak int; RatingHistory `List<int>`; RoundResultWins `List<bool>`). `ZoneControlSessionExportSO` (Core SO) — `ExportSession(summarySO, roundResultSO, ratingHistorySO)` populates payload from non-null SOs, `JsonUtility.ToJson`, caches `_lastExportJson`, fires `_onExportCompleted`; `LastExportJson` property; `Reset()` clears cache; `OnEnable→Reset()`. `ZoneControlSessionExportController` (Core MB) — `_autoExportOnSessionEnd bool` default true; `_onSessionEnded→HandleSessionEnded→TriggerExport()` when auto; `TriggerExport()→_exportSO?.ExportSession(...)`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.

**M70 Zone Control Ownership Map HUD, Reward History, Zone Countdown &amp; Auto-Capture — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T334–T337).**
- T334: `ZoneControlOwnershipMapHUDController` (UI MB) — reads `ZoneControlZoneControllerCatalogSO`; subscribes `_onControlChanged→Refresh`; `_zoneBadgeImages Image[]` colored `_playerColor`/`_botColor` per `GetZoneController(i)`; `_summaryLabel="Player Zones: N / Total"`; panel hidden when catalogSO null; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T335: `ZoneControlRewardHistorySO` (Core SO) — ring buffer `List<int>` `_capacity` default 5; `AddReward(int)` clamps≥0 + prunes oldest + fires `_onHistoryUpdated`; `GetReward(int)` OOB-safe; `GetAverageReward()` safe-div; `Reset()` clears silent. `ZoneControlRewardHistoryController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded→AddReward(captureBonusSO.TotalBonusAwarded)+Refresh`; `_onHistoryUpdated→Refresh`; `_rewardBars fillAmount=Clamp01(reward/maxDisplayReward)`; `_averageLabel="Avg Reward: N"`; panel hidden when historySO null. 12 tests.

**Next milestone (M71):** Suggested directions: (a) `ZoneControlCountdownHUDController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onCountdownExpired`→`HandleExpired`; `Update→Tick`; while countdown is active reads `ZoneControlZoneCountdownSO.Progress` and sets `_progressBar.value`; label shows `"Ready in {remaining:F1}s"` while active / `"Available"` on expiry; (b) `ZoneControlAutoCaptureHUDController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onAutoCapture→HandleAutoCapture`; reads `ZoneControlAutoCaptureController.AccumulatedTime/_autoCaptureSO.AutoCaptureDuration`; `_progressBar.value` shows danger level; label `"Bot Takeover: {remaining:F1}s"`; flashing panel when accumulating; (c) `ZoneControlRewardSummarySO + ZoneControlRewardSummaryController` (Core SO + UI MB) — aggregates per-session total rewards; `AddMatchReward(int)` accumulates; `TotalReward/MatchCount/AverageReward` properties; Controller subscribes `_onMatchEnded`→reads `rewardHistorySO.GetAverageReward()`; HUD shows total, average, and best-match reward; (d) `ZoneControlOwnershipSnapshotSO + ZoneControlOwnershipSnapshotController` (Core SO + Core MB) — captures `ZoneControlZoneControllerCatalogSO` ownership state as `bool[]` at match end; `TakeSnapshot(catalogSO)` clones ownership; `GetSnapshot(int)` OOB-safe; Controller subscribes `_onMatchEnded`→`TakeSnapshot`; fires `_onSnapshotTaken`.

**M66 Zone Control Heatmap, Match Pressure, Zone Lock &amp; Threat Assessment — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T318–T321).**
- T318: `ZoneControlHeatmapSO` (Core SO) — `_zoneCount [Min(1)]` default 4; `RecordCapture(int zoneIndex)` OOB-safe, increments per-zone count, fires `_onHeatmapUpdated`; `GetHeatLevel(int)` normalised 0–1 vs `MaxCaptureCount`; `GetCaptureCount(int)` raw; `Reset()` re-allocates array silently. `ZoneControlHeatmapController` (UI MB) — `_onZoneCaptured IntGameEvent`→`HandleZoneCaptured(int)`→`RecordCapture`; `_onMatchStarted`→`Reset+Refresh`; `_onHeatmapUpdated`→`Refresh`; `_heatBars Image[]`: `fillAmount=GetHeatLevel(i)`; `color=Color.Lerp(_coldColor,_hotColor,heat)`. 12 tests.
- T319: `ZoneControlMatchPressureSO` (Core SO) — `_pressureIncrement/Decay [Range(0.1,1)]` defaults 0.25f; `_highPressureThreshold [Range(0.1,1)]` default 0.75f; `EvaluatePressure(bool botLeads)`: increase/decrease clamped to [0,1]; fires `_onHighPressure` on upward threshold crossing; fires `_onPressureRelieved` on downward crossing; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlMatchPressureController` (Core MB) — `HandleScoreboardUpdated`→`EvaluatePressure(_scoreboardSO.PlayerRank>1)`; `HandleMatchStarted`→`_pressureSO?.Reset()`. 12 tests.
- T320: `ZoneControlZoneLockSO` (Core SO) — `_lockDuration [Min(0.1f)]` default 5f; `LockZone()` sets `_isLocked=true` + resets timer + fires `_onZoneLocked`; `Tick(float dt)` decrements timer, fires `_onZoneUnlocked` on expiry; `LockProgress = _lockTimer/_lockDuration` (0 when unlocked); `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlZoneLockController` (Core MB) — `Update→_lockSO?.Tick(Time.deltaTime)`; `_onZoneCaptured→HandleZoneCaptured→LockZone`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset`. 12 tests.
- T321: `ZoneControlThreatAssessmentSO` (Core SO) — `ThreatLevel` enum Low/Medium/High; `_mediumThreatRank [Min(2)]` default 2; `_highThreatRank [Min(2)]` default 3; `EvaluateThreat(int playerRank, bool hasDominance)`: rank≤1→Low; rank≥high&amp;&amp;!dom→High; rank≥medium→Medium; fires `_onThreatChanged` only on level change; `Reset()` →Low silent. `ZoneControlThreatAssessmentController` (UI MB) — `HandleScoreboardUpdated→EvaluateThreat(PlayerRank, dominanceSO?.HasDominance??false)`; `_onThreatChanged→Refresh`; `HandleMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; Refresh: label=`threat.ToString()`; badge colour per threat (low=green/medium=yellow/high=red). 12 tests.

**Next milestone (M67):** Suggested directions: (a) `ZoneControlAdaptiveSpawnSO + ZoneControlAdaptiveSpawnController` (Core SO + Core MB) — adjusts spawn rate of bot or loot based on `ZoneControlMatchPressureSO.IsHighPressure`; fires `_onSpawnRateChanged`; controller subscribes `_onHighPressure/_onPressureRelieved`→`SetSpawnRate`; (b) `ZoneControlHeatmapHistorySO + ZoneControlHeatmapHistoryController` (Core SO + UI MB) — aggregates `ZoneControlHeatmapSO` snapshots across multiple matches; `AddSnapshot(int[])` appends per-zone counts; `GetLifetimeHeatLevel(int zoneIndex)` normalised across all sessions; controller subscribes `_onMatchEnded`→snapshot; HUD shows session vs lifetime heat comparison; (c) `ZoneControlZoneLockHUDController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onZoneLocked/_onZoneUnlocked`→`Refresh`; shows `_lockProgressBar.value = LockProgress`; `_lockLabel = "Locked: F1s"` / "Available"; panel hidden when not locked; (d) `ZoneControlAlertSystemSO + ZoneControlAlertSystemController` (Core SO + UI MB) — combines `ZoneControlMatchPressureSO.IsHighPressure` + `ZoneControlThreatAssessmentSO.CurrentThreat≥High` + `ZoneDominanceSO.HasDominance=false` to declare a `CriticalAlert`; fires `_onCriticalAlert VoidGameEvent`; controller subscribes all three channels and calls `EvaluateAlert`; HUD shows flashing alert banner.

**M65 Match Event Timeline, Bot Difficulty, Match Goal &amp; Bonus Chest — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T314–T317).**
- T314: `ZoneControlMatchEventSO` (Core SO) — `ZoneControlMatchEventType` enum ZoneCaptured/HazardActivated/ComboReached; `ZoneControlMatchEvent [Serializable]`: Timestamp float/Type/Description string; bounded ring buffer `_maxEvents` default 20; `AddEvent(float,type,description)` evicts oldest when full, null description stored as Empty, fires `_onEventAdded`; `Reset()` clears silently; `Events IReadOnlyList`/`EventCount`/`MaxEvents`. `ZoneControlMatchEventController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onZoneCaptured/_onHazardActivated/_onComboReached`→`AddEvent(Time.time, type, label)`; `_onEventAdded→Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted(Reset+Refresh)`; Refresh destroys stale rows + spawns newest-first (texts[0]="{F1}s", texts[1]=description). 12 tests.
- T315: `ZoneControlBotDifficultyProfileSO` (Core SO) — formula `Max(minimum, base - wave × reduction)`; `_baseCaptureInterval` default 10f; `_intervalReductionPerWave` default 0.5f; `_minimumInterval` default 2f; negative wave clamped to 0; `OnValidate` clamps minimum to [0.1, base]. `ZoneControlBotDifficultyController` (Core MB) — subscribes `_onWaveStarted→HandleWaveStarted`(reads `WaveManagerSO.CurrentWave`, computes interval from profile, sets `_isRunning=true`); `Update` accumulates dt → `RecordBotCapture(0)` on expiry; `HandleMatchStarted/Ended` disarm timer; all refs optional. 12 tests.
- T316: `ZoneControlMatchGoalSO` (Core SO) — `ZoneControlMatchGoalType` enum FirstToCaptures/MostZonesInTime; `IsGoalMet(int playerScore, int timeElapsed)`: FC → playerScore≥captureTarget; MZ → timeElapsed≥(int)timeLimitSeconds; `GoalDescription` property; `OnValidate` clamps. `ZoneControlMatchGoalController` (UI MB) — `HandleScoreboardUpdated`: null goalSO or already met → return; evaluates goal idempotently; first-met → `_isGoalMet=true + _onGoalMet?.Raise() + Refresh`; `HandleMatchStarted` resets flag + records `_matchStartTime = Time.time`; `Refresh` shows `GoalDescription`. 12 tests.
- T317: `ZoneControlBonusChestSO` (Core SO) — `_captureInterval [Min(1)]` default 5; `CheckChest(int)`: integer division tracks `_lastMilestone`; fires `_onChestSpawned` + increments `_totalChests` per newly crossed interval (handles multi-interval jumps); `Reset()` silently zeros. `ZoneControlBonusChestController` (UI MB) — `HandlePlayerCaptured` increments `_captureCount + CheckChest`; `HandleMatchStarted` resets count + SO; `Refresh` shows "Next chest: N". 12 tests.

**Next milestone (M66):** Suggested directions: (a) `ZoneControlHeatmapSO + ZoneControlHeatmapController` (Core SO + UI MB) — tracks frequency of zone captures per zone index across a session; `RecordCapture(int zoneIndex)` increments per-zone count; `GetHeatLevel(int)` normalised 0–1; HUD shows a bar per zone coloured by heat; (b) `ZoneControlMatchPressureSO + ZoneControlMatchPressureController` (Core SO + Core MB) — accumulates a pressure float when bots lead on score; fires `_onHighPressure`/`_onPressureRelieved`; pressure decays if player re-takes lead; controller subscribes `_onScoreboardUpdated`; (c) `ZoneControlZoneLockSO + ZoneControlZoneLockController` (Core SO + Core MB) — temporarily locks a zone from capture for `_lockDuration` seconds after it changes hands; `LockZone()/IsLocked/LockProgress`; controller subscribes `_onZoneCaptured→LockZone`; Update ticks unlock timer; (d) `ZoneControlThreatAssessmentSO + ZoneControlThreatAssessmentController` (Core SO + UI MB) — scores bot threat level based on `ZoneControlScoreboardSO.PlayerRank` and `ZoneDominanceSO.HasDominance`; `ThreatLevel` enum Low/Medium/High; fires `_onThreatChanged`; HUD shows coloured threat badge.

**M63 Zone Control Combo, Coop Score, Tournament &amp; League — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T306–T309).**
- T306: `ZoneControlComboTrackerSO` (Core SO) — `RecordCapture()` increments `_comboCount`; multiplier=`Min(1+count×_multiplierPerCombo, _maxMultiplier)`; `Tick(dt)` advances `_timeSinceLastCapture` and calls `LoseCombo()` when window exceeded; `LoseCombo()` resets state and fires `_onComboLost`/`_onComboUpdated`; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlComboHUDController` (UI MB) — subscribes 4 channels; `Update→Tick`; `Refresh` shows "Combo: N" and "xF2". 12 tests.
- T307: `ZoneControlCoopScoreSO` (Core SO) — `AddPlayerCapture`/`AddAllyCapture` accumulate independently; `CheckMilestone()` fires `_onMilestoneReached` once when `TotalCaptures>=SharedMilestone`; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlCoopScoreController` (UI MB) — subscribes player/ally capture events→`Add*+Refresh`; Refresh shows labels + milestoneBadge. 12 tests.
- T308: `ZoneControlTournamentSO` (Core SO) — `_roundZoneTargets int[]` default {5,10,15}; `SubmitRoundResult(captured,target)` increments wins/losses; advances `_currentRound`; sets `_isComplete` and fires `_onTournamentComplete` when all rounds played; idempotent after complete; `LoadSnapshot`/`TakeSnapshot`/`Reset`. `ZoneControlTournamentController` (UI MB) — `HandleMatchEnded` reads `summarySO.TotalZonesCaptured` vs `CurrentRoundTarget`; Refresh shows round/wins/losses/target labels + completeBadge. 14 tests.
- T309: `ZoneControlLeagueSO` (Core SO) — `ZoneControlLeagueDivision` enum Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum; `AddRatingPoints(int)` adds `rating×_pointsPerRating`; `EvaluatePromotion()`: promotion when points≥threshold and div<Platinum; relegation when points<relegationThreshold and div>Bronze; each path fires distinct event + adjusts counts; `LoadSnapshot`/`TakeSnapshot`/`Reset`. `ZoneControlLeagueController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onRatingSet`→`HandleRatingSet`→`AddRatingPoints(_ratingController.CurrentRating)`; 3 VoidGameEvent refresh channels; Refresh shows division/points/promotion labels. 12 tests.

**M62 Zone Control Achievements, Ranking, Daily Challenge &amp; High Score — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T302–T305).**
- T302: `ZoneControlAchievementCatalogSO` (Core SO) — `ZoneControlAchievementType` enum TotalZones/Dominance/Streak; `ZoneControlAchievementEntry [Serializable]` sealed class (id/displayName/type/targetValue); `EvaluateAchievements(ZoneControlSessionSummarySO)` iterates entries, earns per metric, fires `_onAchievementUnlocked` per new achievement; idempotent; `LoadSnapshot(IReadOnlyList<string>)`/`TakeSnapshot()`/`Reset()`. `ZoneControlAchievementController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onMatchEnded`→`HandleMatchEnded`→`EvaluateAchievements`+`Refresh`; subscribes `_onAchievementUnlocked`→`Refresh`; `_countLabel="{N}/{Total}"`; `_latestLabel=LatestEarnedDisplayName`. 12 tests.
- T303: `ZoneControlRankingSO` (Core SO) — `ZoneControlRankLevel` enum Unranked=0..Diamond=5; `_zoneThresholds int[]` default {10,25,50,100,200} + `_tierThresholds int[]` default {1,2,3,4,5}; `EvaluateRank(totalZones,unlockedTiers)` advances rank when zone OR tier threshold met, never decreases, fires `_onRankChanged`; `GetRankLabel()`; `GetNextZoneThreshold()` returns -1 at Diamond; `LoadSnapshot`/`TakeSnapshot`/`Reset`. `ZoneControlRankingController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onGateUnlocked`→`HandleGateUnlocked`→`EvaluateRank`; subscribes `_onRankChanged`→`Refresh`; `_rankLabel`; `_nextThresholdLabel`. 14 tests.
- T304: `ZoneControlDailyChallengeConfig` (Core SO) — `_possibleTargets float[]` default {5,10,15,20,30}; `GetTodayTarget()` seeds `System.Random(DateTime.Today.GetHashCode())`; `GetSecondsUntilReset()` returns seconds to midnight UTC. `ZoneControlDailyChallengeController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onMatchEnded`; `Refresh` shows `_targetLabel`+`_countdownLabel`; `Update` refreshes countdown live; `internal static FormatCountdown(int)`="Resets in Xh Ym". 12 tests.
- T305: `ZoneControlHighScoreSO` (Core SO) — `_onNewHighScore VoidGameEvent`; `_bestZoneCount/_bestPace/_bestStreak` + transient `IsNewZoneCount/IsNewPace/IsNewStreak`; `UpdateFromMatch` resets flags + updates independently per category + fires event per new record; `LoadSnapshot`/`TakeSnapshot()`/`Reset`. `ZoneControlHighScoreController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onMatchEnded`+`_onNewHighScore`; `HandleMatchEnded` reads `TotalZonesCaptured`, `GetCapturesPerMinute(Time.time)`, `BestCaptureStreak`; `Refresh` labels+badges. 12 tests.

**Next milestone (M63):** Suggested directions: (a) `ZoneControlTournamentSO + ZoneControlTournamentController` (Core SO + UI MB) — multi-round zone-control tournament bracket with per-round zone targets, win/loss tracking, trophy reward on completion, and persistence; (b) `ZoneControlLeagueSO + ZoneControlLeagueController` (Core SO + UI MB) — seasonal league that accumulates zone rating points, assigns Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum divisions, awards end-of-season rewards, and persists promotion/relegation history; (c) `ZoneControlComboTrackerSO + ZoneControlComboHUDController` (Core SO + UI MB) — rapid consecutive zone captures within a time window accumulate a multiplier bonus; fires `_onComboLost` when the window expires; displays live combo count and multiplier in HUD; (d) `ZoneControlCoopScoreSO + ZoneControlCoopScoreController` (Core SO + UI MB) — cooperative two-player zone score SO that tracks player+ally combined captures, shared score milestone, and bonus threshold; Controller displays combined leaderboard.

**M61 Progression Gate, Weekly Challenge, Commentary &amp; Replay Export — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T298–T301).**
- T298: `ZoneControlProgressionGateSO` (Core SO) — `_gateThresholds int[]` default {5,15,30,50,75}; `EvaluateGates(int)` iterates from `_unlockedTiers`, fires `_onGateUnlocked` per newly crossed threshold, idempotent; `LoadSnapshot(int)` clamps to [0,GateCount]; `Reset()` silent; `NextThreshold` returns -1 when `AllUnlocked`. `ZoneControlProgressionGateController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onSummaryUpdated`+`_onGateUnlocked`→`Refresh`; calls `EvaluateGates` from `_summarySO.TotalZonesCaptured`; labels: "Tier: N", "Next: N zones"/"Max Tier!", "N / M"; panel hidden when gateSO null. 12 tests.

- T300: `ZoneControlCommentaryCatalogSO` (Core SO) — `ZoneControlCommentaryEventType` enum FastPace/SlowPace/RatingSet/ZoneCaptured; 4 string[] message pools with inspector defaults; `GetMessage(type)` round-robin via per-type index; `ResetIndices()` zeros all; `OnEnable→ResetIndices()`. `ZoneControlMatchCommentaryController` (UI MB) — subscribes 4 event channels→Handle* methods→`ShowBanner(type)`: null catalog/empty msg→return; sets `_isActive`, timer, panel, label; `Update→Tick` auto-hides after `_displayDuration` (default 2s). 12 tests.
- T301: `ZoneControlReplayExportSO` (Core SO) — `ZoneControlReplayPayload [Serializable]`: `List<float> timestamps` + `List<string> captureStates` (comma-joined bool strings); `ExportToJson(replay)` builds payload via `EncodeCaptureState`, `JsonUtility.ToJson`, caches `_lastExportJson`, fires `_onExportCompleted`; `ParsePayload(json)→null` on failure; `Reset()` clears cache; `OnEnable→Reset()`. `ZoneControlReplayExportController` (Core MB) — `_autoExportOnMatchEnd bool` default true; `HandleMatchEnded→TriggerExport` when auto; `TriggerExport()→_exportSO?.ExportToJson(_replaySO)`. 12 tests.

**M60 Zone Control Career &amp; Adaptation Layer — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T294–T297).**

**ArenaHazardWarningController wiring (T226) — Editor-session steps:**
1. Add `ArenaHazardWarningController` to the in-match HUD canvas.
   - `_hazardZones`      → Array of HazardZoneSO assets (one per arena hazard).
   - `_hazardTransforms` → Parallel array of Transforms at each hazard's world position.
   - `_robotTransform`   → The player robot's root Transform.
   - `_warningDistance`  → Distance threshold (e.g. 10f world units).
   - `_bannerPanel`      → Root warning panel (hidden when all hazards are out of range).
   - `_hazardNameLabel`  → Text showing the nearest hazard type name.
   - `_distanceLabel`    → Text showing "{N}m" distance to nearest hazard.

**RespawnCountdownController wiring (T227) — Editor-session steps:**
1. Create a `RobotRespawn` SO asset: Assets ▶ Create ▶ BattleRobots ▶ Core ▶ RobotRespawn.
   - Wire `_onRespawnUsed` → a shared VoidGameEvent (e.g. "OnRespawnUsed").
   - Wire `_onRespawnReady` → a shared VoidGameEvent (e.g. "OnRespawnReady").
2. Add `RespawnCountdownController` to the in-match HUD canvas.
   - `_respawnSO`              → the RobotRespawnSO asset above.
   - `_onRespawnUsed`          → same VoidGameEvent.
   - `_onRespawnReady`         → same VoidGameEvent.
   - `_countdownLabel`         → Text showing "N.Fs" while cooling down, or "Ready".
   - `_respawnsRemainingLabel` → Text showing "{N} left".
   - `_panel`                  → Root panel.
3. Call RobotRespawnSO.UseRespawn() when the robot is destroyed.
4. Wire RobotRespawnSO.Reset() to the MatchStarted event.

**BonusObjectiveHUDController wiring (T228) — Editor-session steps:**
1. Create a `MatchBonusObjective` SO asset: Assets ▶ Create ▶ BattleRobots ▶ Core ▶ MatchBonusObjective.
   - Set `_bonusTitle`, `_bonusReward`, and `_timeLimit` (0 = no time limit).
   - Wire `_onChanged` → a shared VoidGameEvent (e.g. "OnBonusObjectiveChanged").
2. Add `BonusObjectiveHUDController` to the in-match HUD canvas.
   - `_bonusObjective` → the MatchBonusObjectiveSO asset above.
   - `_onChanged`      → same VoidGameEvent.
   - `_titleLabel`     → Text for the objective title.
   - `_statusLabel`    → Text showing "COMPLETE!" / "EXPIRED" / countdown / "Active".
   - `_rewardLabel`    → Text showing "Reward: N".
   - `_timerBar`       → Slider driven by TimeRatio [0→1].
   - `_panel`          → Root panel.
3. Call MatchBonusObjectiveSO.Complete() when the player satisfies the bonus condition.
4. Wire MatchBonusObjectiveSO.Reset() to the MatchStarted event.
